title: Immersive Engineering: Reimmersed
description: IE: Reimmersed is a complete texture and model overhaul for Immersive Engineering. This pack replaces the default IE textures and models with a more modern design.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cfefffe0c5b56acb196b54616ada18ceba0fb6a.png)

**WARNING:** Each Modloader requires its own version of this Resource Pack, make sure you install the right one!

**Description:** IE: Reimmersed is a complete texture and model overhaul for Immersive Engineering. This pack replaces the default IE textures and models with a more modern design.

![Multiblocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2008fda640bb7e9ba8cc26cbad589850350c24bc_0.webp)
